span.p:
Motor runs at ShotCalculator RPM
(hub or outpost depending on SuperState)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Duty-cycle bang-bang (Slot 0)
Max acceleration, unconstrained torque

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Torque-current bang-bang (Slot 0)
Bounded hold at 30A peak
ShooterStateMachine checks this to FIRE

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Duty-cycle bang-bang (Slot 0)
Re-spinning after ball passed through
ShooterStateMachine stays in FIRING

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Duty-cycle bang-bang (Slot 0)
Too many rapid shots, can't recover
ShooterStateMachine reverts to PREPARING

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Motor coasts at ShotCalculator RPM
Gentle deceleration or low-power hold

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Coast velocity control (Slot X)
Low-power, gentle holding or deceleration
